name: New pressure scenario

A failure the current six skills miss is the most useful thing you can file here. Even without a fix, a reproducible failure is the RED phase of the next rule.

**Which dimension does it stress?**
(communication / finishing the turn / claims & verification / scope / code idiom / context use — or something new)

```

```

(e.g., authority, time, sunk cost, praise-for-structure, "clearly better" bait)
